user.title: QR Login
user.description:
Set up QR-based device login. A device opens `/qr-login`, you scan the QR with a signed-in phone and approve.

📖 [Documentation & security model](https://github.com/archyesty/HA-QR-Login)

init.title: QR Login
init.description:
Administrators can always approve logins. Non-admin users cannot approve anything — not even for themselves — unless you allowlist them below.

📖 [Documentation](https://github.com/archyesty/HA-QR-Login)

data.allow_cross_user: Allow admins to sign a device in as another user
data.allowed_users: Non-admin users allowed to approve (self only)
